summary: Field View feature testing completed successfully. All Field View buttons appear correctly in Run Play, Pass Play (completion), and Sack yards sections. The FieldViewDialog opens properly, shows miniature football field with start/end position markers, slider works correctly, and yardage calculations are accurate.
seed_data_creation: Used existing OHIO vs NC STATE game for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field View feature is fully functional. The FieldViewDialog component shows a miniature football field with current ball position and allows dragging a slider to set end position. Yardage calculation works correctly: for home team (going left to right), moving right = positive yards; for away team (going right to left), moving left = positive yards. 50-yard line crossing is handled properly.

field_view_button_run_play.description: Field View button appears in Run Play yards input section when 'Gain' result is selected

field_view_button_pass_play.description: Field View button appears in Pass Play yards section when 'Complete' result is selected

field_view_button_sack.description: Field View button appears in Sack yards lost section when 'Sacked' result is selected

field_view_dialog_opens.description: FieldViewDialog opens when clicking Field View button

field_view_shows_field.description: Dialog shows miniature football field with team end zones (colored), yard lines, and 50-yard line marker

field_view_start_position.description: Yellow marker shows current ball position (start position)

field_view_end_position.description: Green/red marker shows end position that can be adjusted

field_view_slider.description: Slider allows dragging to set end position

yardage_positive_gain.description: Positive yards (gain) calculated correctly when moving toward opponent's goal

yardage_negative_loss.description: Negative yards (loss) calculated correctly when moving toward own goal

yardage_50_yard_crossing.description: 50-yard line crossing handled correctly (e.g., NC 25 → OHI 45 = +30 yards)

field_view_confirm_updates_yards.description: Clicking 'Set X Yards Gain/Loss' button closes dialog and updates yards in main form

field_view_cancel.description: Cancel button closes dialog without updating yards

test_flow: 3. Click on OHIO vs NC STATE live game
4. Test Run Play: Click RUN → Enter player #22 → Continue → Select Gain → Verify Field View button appears
5. Click Field View button → Verify dialog opens with miniature field
6. Test slider: Click +10, +5, -10 buttons → Verify yards update correctly
7. Test yardage calculation: Verify positive yards for gains, negative for losses
8. Test 50-yard line crossing: Move from NC 25 to OHI 45 → Verify +30 yards
9. Click Set Yards button → Verify yards updated in main form
10. Test Pass Play: Click PASS → Enter QB #12 → Continue → Select Complete → Verify Field View button
11. Test Sack: Select Sacked → Verify Field View button appears in yards lost section
